headline: Expand Energy (NASDAQ:EXE) Surges After-Hours on Strong Q1 Earnings Beat and $1.6B Debt Reduction
summary: Expand Energy beats Q1 2026 estimates with $3.83 EPS, reduces debt by $1.3B, and signs a 20-year LNG deal, boosting shares in after-hours trading.
